title: No World Border
description: Sometimes you just don't wanna see the world border.
body:
## For when the world border breaks immersion.
As an example, I play Origin Realms, which uses world borders quite a bit. I built my house near the world border of my private realm, and I always thought it looked ugly. I made this resource pack so I could enjoy the scenery. No world border. Nada.

Best of all, this pack is so simple, you don't have to worry about downloading the right version. It's a one-size-fits-all resource pack! Though, do keep in mind you'll get an incompatibility warning for some versions, you can ignore it.

Before:![Before is UGLY WOWIE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pL8RrDwJ/images/daf22e88fbc0079e8d4073fc8fb79fda41604334.png)

After:![I hope your eyes have been cleansed now that you've seen the after image.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pL8RrDwJ/images/fa4a3144dc60590ee39a0fbb2686d42a8bc44423.png)
